/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_lower_phy_downlink_processor.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_lower_phy_downlink_processor.dir/downlink_processor_baseband_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_lower_phy_downlink_processor.dir/downlink_processor_factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_lower_phy_downlink_processor.dir/downlink_processor_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_lower_phy_downlink_processor.a
